subject: Fix go.mod for monitor
commit_message:
Fix go.mod for monitor

Removed replace commands that were causing the build to fail in go.mod
Updated go.mod and go.sum with local build result and 'go mod tidy'

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1101
Change-Id: I84d5fd8591bfcae84e6c38827543d9b9aae3f718
Signed-off-by: Larry Sachs <larry.j.sachs@intel.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

add a little more information to the commit message, including the title.

something like: fix go.mod for monitor

and a line or two about what the fix is about in the body.

also, in the patch, just remove the lines instead of commenting them out.
